alkylation reagent: alkylated with 5 mM iodoacetamide in the dark at room temperature for 15 min.
instrument: Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid Mass Spectrometer
analyzed by liquid chromatography/tandem mass spectrometry using a nano-Easy LC 1000 interfaced with an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid Mass Spectrometer
labeling: proteomic approach to discover transcriptional regulators.
reduction reagent: reduced in 2.5 mM dithiothreitol at 60 °C for 1 h
